entry.title: New: BILL035(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO LEASE AND RENTAL OF CITY REAL PROPERTY.

The purpose of this bill is to amend ROH Chapter 38, particularly Articles 1 through 4, to streamline the process by which the City leases property.

Latest action: Second reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
